title: pelargonium × adelinae
intro: Pelargonium × adelinae, a species of the pelargonium plant family, is a hybrid plant known for its fragrant leaves and flowers. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × adelinae include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, soothe digestive problems, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to make a medicinal drink, such as rooibos tea, which has been consumed for centuries in South Africa.
